recentArticles.title: '48-year-old' So Ji-sub sports a graying 'goat' beard.. Already exuding 'middle-aged charm' [Photo shoot] - starnewskorea.com
recentArticles.snippet: # '48-year-old' So Ji-sub sports a graying 'goat' beard.. Already exuding 'middle-aged charm' [Photo shoot]. Actor So Ji-sub is exuding middle-aged charm. On the 24th, So Ji-sub posted photos from a fashion magazine Allure photo shoot on his SNS. He is starring in SBS's new Friday-Saturday drama "Manager Kim," which premieres on the 26th, and posed for the photo shoot alongside co-stars Choi Tae-hoon and Yoon Kyung-ho. In the photo shoot, So Ji-sub immersed himself in the role of Manager Kim, an accountant at a savings bank and a single dad in "Manager Kim," revealing a mature charm. With his distinctive look featuring a beard, he wore shirts and suits, exuding charisma. Meanwhile, "Manager Kim" is a father-universe revenge action drama about a father who becomes "the world's most dangerous man" to win back his only daughter, who is "the world's most ordinary" dad. ## Recommended News. ## Daily Trending News. ## Editor’s Pick. ## Latest in Entertainment.

recentArticles.title: So Many Celebrities Attend Dior Homme Menswear Spring/Summer 2027's Fashion Show: Photos & Guest List, Revealed! - Just Jared
recentArticles.snippet: So many stars stepped out for the ***Dior Homme Menswear Spring/Summer 2027*** show as part of Paris Fashion Week on Wednesday (June 24) in Paris, France. Some of the celebs were posed for photos at the show include **James Marsden**, 52, with his girlfriend, Dutch model **Frederique Brons**, 28, **Iris Apatow**, 23, and **Sam Nivola**, 22, **Pharrell Williams** and his wife **Helen Lasichanh**, influencer **Jake Shane**, **Mike Faist**, and **Drew Starkey**. We have photos of all the biggest attendees, which also included *I Swear*‘s **Robert Aramayo**, *SAS: Rogue Heroes*‘ **Connor Swindells, LaKeith Stanfield,** *The White Lotus*‘ **Alexander Ludwig**, *I Play Rocky*‘s **Anthony Ippolito,** actress **Sophie Okonedo**, record producer **Chris Ivery**, rapper **Little Simz**, socialite **Fai Khadra**, and more! recentArticles.title: Want to see Jacob Collier live? Get tickets with a discount today - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Want to see Jacob Collier live? Starting in late September, the mid-2010s internet star-turned-seven-time Grammy winner is slated to set off on his intimate solo ‘The Light For Days Tour’ in support of his 2025 album with the same name. If you’d like to see the “In My Room” singer live, tickets are available for all his North American gigs. At the time of publication, the lowest price we could find on seats for any one show was $118 including fees on SeatGeek. Tickets start at $548 including fees for Collier’s night at Carnegie Hall. For more information, our team has everything you need to know and more about seeing Jacob Collier’s 2026 ‘The Light For Days Tour’ below. ## How much are tickets to see Jacob Collier on tour in 2026? recentArticles.title: 'Jersey Shore' star Jenni 'JWoww' Farley marries pro wrestler Zack Carpinello in surprise wedding - Page Six
recentArticles.snippet: ##### Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift’s strict wedding rule for... Shop Prime Day like a star with deals on A-list beauty favorites: Crest, Charlotte Tilbury and more. # ‘Jersey Shore’ star Jenni ‘JWoww’ Farley marries pro wrestler Zack Carpinello in surprise wedding. Congratulations are in order for Jenni “JWoww” Farley and her new husband Zack Carpinello! The couple surprised their wedding guests with the ceremony, as they invited 50 friends and family members to the venue for what they believed to be a special screening of her upcoming film, “Nanny Cam.”. Farley walked to her now-husband to the tune of Lana Del Rey’s “Young and Beautiful” — the same song her best friend Nicole “Snooki” Polizzi used for her first dance at her wedding to Jionni LaValle in 2014. “From my ruby ring and Zack’s new rose gold wedding band featuring rubies, to our color palette and the gifts we incorporated for our children, the ruby represented love, family, and the next chapter of our story.”.

recentArticles.title: iOS 27 Wallet App Gets 7 New Features - MacRumors
recentArticles.snippet: Apple is making more of an effort to turn the iPhone into a physical wallet replacement in iOS 27, and there are several upgrades to the Wallet app. There is a new Pass Designer Mac app for developers that makes it easier to create a pass using a WYSIWYG editor. There's a "Create a Pass" feature in the Wallet app for adding tickets, memberships, and more using Visual Intelligence. If you have a ticket for an event and there's not a digital version available for the Wallet app already, you can create one using the physical pass. You can scan a pass and add it with Visual Intelligence if there's a barcode or QR code, or a pass can be added manually. Using the new Siri Mode in the Camera app, or a feature in the Messages and Wallet apps, you can take a photo of a bill and use Apple Intelligence to figure out what each person owes.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導介紹了 iOS 27 Wallet App 的新功能，包括透過視覺智慧將實體票券數位化，以及利用 Apple Intelligence 分攤帳單。

recentArticles.snippet: # After Years Of Being Accused Of Wearing A Wig, Beyoncé Just Revealed What Jay-Z’s Natural Hair Looks Like, And OMG. “When she told her father that, it inspired Jay to grow out his hair.”. ## Jay-Z has been sporting an afro for the first time in his career this summer, and his epic hair transformation took a ton of time, patience, and familial motivation. ## In the video, Beyoncé reveals that Jay decided to grow out his hair when Blue Ivy was just 5 years old. ## “I always thought it was beautiful that the real reason Jay grew out his hair was to show Blue that her hair was like his hair," Beyoncé narrated. When she told her father that, it inspired Jay to grow out his hair.". ## "Finding out the real reason Jay Z started growing out his hair was to show Blue Ivy he had the same texture so she could embrace and love her hair is the most wholesome thing I’ve seen in a while".

recentArticles.snippet: * Prime Day deals: Apple, Stanley, Hanes and more. * Prime Day deals worth the splurge. * Hair thickening products on sale for Prime Day. # Hailey Bieber strips down in risqué Skims ad – See the photos. Add Yahoo as a preferred source to see more of our stories on Google. Hailey Bieber is turning heads as the latest Skims model. The model is featured in the Kim Kardashian-founded brand's latest campaign promoting its everyday cotton line. In racy photos posted by Kardashian, the longtime Kardashian-Jenner family friend is seen toned and tanned, her hair messy. Justin Bieber, Hailey's husband and father to their son Jack Blues, also shared the photos. Friends of Bieber praised the model's photos in the comments, with Khloé Kardashian writing, "Soooo hot it's wild," and Justine Skye writing, "EXACTLY.". In February, Skims debuted the new everyday cotton line in a similarly stripped-down campaign with Kylie Jenner. *This article originally appeared on USA TODAY:* *Hailey Bieber models lingerie for Kim Kardashian's Skims in new ad*.

recentArticles.title: Brooklyn Public Library releases limited-edition Jay-Z library cards - 6sqft
recentArticles.snippet: Brooklyn Public Library releases limited-edition Jay-Z library cards. Images courtesy of the Brooklyn Public Library. The Brooklyn Public Library is releasing a limited-edition Jay-Z library card in honor of the 30th anniversary of the Brooklyn-born rapper’s debut album. Starting Thursday, the JAŸ-Z 30 Limited Edition Library Card will be available at BPL branches systemwide on a first-come, first-served basis, while supplies last. Created in collaboration with Roc Nation, the card celebrates the 30th anniversary of “Reasonable Doubt” and comes ahead of the rapper’s three highly anticipated performances at Yankee Stadium next month. Visitors to Bed-Stuy’s Marcy Library will also be able to check out books from JAŸ-Z’s Booklist on a dedicated display shelf featuring titles donated by Roc Nation. In July 2023, the library released “The Book of HOV” library card collection alongside an exhibition of the same name presented by the BPL and Roc Nation at the Central branch.

recentArticles.title: Beyoncé and Jay-Z's rarely-seen son Sir joins siblings in intimate family video - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: * Beyonce released a behind-the-scenes family video on Father's Day showing Jay-Z's hair transformation journey with the help of their family and friends. * The video included never-before-seen footage of Jay-Z with his rarely seen son, Sir, as well as clips of Blue Ivy and Rumi dancing at Jay-Z's concert in Philadelphia. * Jay-Z decided to grow out his hair to show solidarity with his daughter Blue, who was feeling insecure about her own hair, and the transformation process took six days with the help of his family. The video featured several throwback clips of Jay-Z with his family, including never-before-seen footage with his nine-year-old son, Sir. Unlike his sisters, the Carter's only son prefers to keep out of the spotlight, but clips included one of him on the beach with his dad, and another of Jay-Z holding Sir and Rumi as toddlers. * ### Why Beyoncé's son Sir Carter isn't in the spotlight like his sisters Rumi and Blue Ivy.

recentArticles.title: New Apple TV 4K is coming this fall with three new features: report - 9to5Mac
recentArticles.snippet: # New Apple TV 4K is coming this fall with three new features: report. The wait for a new Apple TV 4K has been longer than expected, but the latest report from *Bloomberg* indicates it’s on track for a fall launch with three new features. ## Siri AI, revised remote, and more Apple Intelligence features rumored for Apple TV 4K, with new HomePods coming too. Much of what he reported has been covered extensively before, but one standout was an update on two long-rumored products: new Apple TV 4K and HomePod mini. > Finally, the new Apple TV and HomePod mini with Apple Intelligence are both in very advanced testing. The new Apple TV 4K in particular has been long anticipated. Now that we know the full Apple Intelligence story in iOS 27, there are a variety of new AI features that could fit well on tvOS too—beyond Siri. What’s on your wishlist for the new Apple TV 4K and/or HomePod models? ### Apple TV 4K.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Apple TV 4K和HomePod即將推出新版本並搭載Apple Intelligence功能，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z's Roc Nation Scores Major Win in Tony Buzbee Legal War - TMZ
recentArticles.snippet: # Jay-Z's Roc Nation Scores Major Win in Tony Buzbee Legal War. ## Roc Nation & Jay Z Score Legal Victory in Diddy Fallout Feud. The bitter legal war between **Jay-Z** and attorney **Tony Buzbee** just took another turn and this round went to Roc Nation. The litigation involves claims Roc Nation and lawyers working with Jay-Z's camp improperly targeted Buzbee's clients amid the fallout from the Diddy scandal and later allegations involving Jay-Z. The lawsuits were among several legal offshoots spawned by the escalating feud between Buzbee and Jay-Z's team after Buzbee filed a now withdrawn lawsuit that included claims of sexual assault against the rap mogul. Jay-Z denied the allegations and aggressively fought back, claiming Buzbee of pursuing false allegations and launching multiple legal challenges against the attorney. Now, a judge ruled the state lacks personal jurisdiction over Roc Nation and dismissed the claims against the company.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞與周杰倫無關，主要報導Jay-Z的Roc Nation在與律師Tony Buzbee的法律戰中取得勝利。

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Grew Out His Hair for Blue Ivy - The Cut
recentArticles.snippet: Jay-Z Grew Out His Hair for Blue Ivy. Things you buy through our links may earn *Vox Media* a commission. # Jay-Z Grew Out His Hair for Blue Ivy. By  Olivia Craighead, a news writer for The Cut who covers pop culture and celebrity. On Father’s Day, a few weeks after the rapper appeared at the Roots Picnic last month sporting a combed-out Afro, Beyoncé and her hair-product brand, Cécred, shared a seven-minute video titled “The Blueprint.” In it, she narrated the sentimental story behind her husband’s locs and why he decided to comb them out after more than eight years. “I thought it was always beautiful that the real reason Jay grew out his hair was to show Blue that her hair was like his hair,” Beyoncé said over footage of Jay and their oldest daughter. Eight years later, ahead of Jay-Z’s appearance with the Roots in Philadelphia, he told Beyoncé that he wanted to comb out his hair in order to honor his father, who wore an Afro and loved Philadelphia sports.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要報導Jay-Z為女兒Blue Ivy留髮及為紀念父親而梳開頭髮的故事。

recentArticles.title: Rick Baker Set For Locarno Honorary Award - Deadline
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘An American Werewolf In London’ & Michael Jackson’s ‘Thriller’ Make-Up Artist Rick Baker Set For Locarno Honorary Award. Rick Baker, the veteran make-up artist behind Michael Jackson’s *Thriller* music video and Hollywood classics like *The Nutty Professor* and *An American Werewolf in London*, will be awarded the honorary Vision Award at this year’s Locarno Film Festival. Baker will be handed the award at the festival’s Piazza Grande on August 12. “Rick Baker was responsible for a Copernican revolution in cinema: visionary and revolutionary, he opened new paths for the imagination of entire generations, showing what it truly means to witness physical transmutation on the big screen,” Locarno director Giona A. ### Asia Argento Set For Locarno Lifetime Achievement Award. Presenting the Vision Award in Locarno to a pioneer and innovator like him, an absolute genius and incomparable craftsman, is an honour through which the Festival celebrates the infinite possibilities of cinema and its bag of tricks.”. ## Must Read Stories.
recentArticles.summary: 資深化妝師Rick Baker將在盧卡諾影展獲頒榮譽視覺獎，表彰他在電影特效化妝領域的貢獻，此新聞與周杰倫無直接關聯。
